title: Nikolaites #3531
definition:
Nicolaitans = "destruction of people"

 1) a sect mentioned in \\#Re 2:6,15\\, who were charged with holding the
    error of Balaam, casting a stumbling block before the church of
    God by upholding the liberty of eating things sacrificed to idols
    as well as committing fornication
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nicolaitans = "destruction of people"

 1) a sect mentioned in \\#Re 2:6,15\\, who were charged with holding the
    error of Balaam, casting a stumbling block before the church of
    God by upholding the liberty of eating things sacrificed to idols

    NASB:  a Nicolaitan, a follower of Nicolaus, who prob. was not the same as 3532:
